compiled_state.title: E2.1: port get-file-impact + get-verify-commands in-process
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Port get-file-impact + get-verify-commands (sibling field reads) to in-process Python.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both dispatch in-process via rebar._cli (_FIELD_READS set, full auto-init)
- [ ] Library get_file_impact/get_verify_commands rewired off _run to in-process
- [ ] Dual-run parity python==bash (success/miss/arity/empty; both --output modes)
- [ ] No bash deleted (parity-pinned second impl until E7/E8)

comments.body: DONE (commit a3a7eb2d). Ported both field-read arms to rebar._engine_support.field_reads (pure helpers + byte-parity CLI), routed in-process via _FIELD_READS (full auto-init), rewired library off _run. Dual-run parity 12 scenarios green (success/miss/arity/empty, both --output modes; file-impact spaced+silent-[]-on-miss, verify-commands compact+envelope-on-miss). interfaces+unit 1281 passed. Live binary verified. No bash deleted (parity-pinned 2nd impl until E7/E8).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
